heading: Repealed. , title III, § 307,Aug. 9, 1955, ch. 65669 Stat. 589
label: 301 to 303 Repealed. , title III, § 307,Aug. 9, 1955, ch. 65669 Stat. 589
notes: Section 301, acts , title I, § 1, ; , §§ 1, 5, , granted absentee members of land or naval forces of the United States the right to vote in Presidential, Vice Presidential, and Congressional elections. See section 20301 et seq. of Title 52, Voting and Elections.Sept. 16, 1942, ch. 56156 Stat. 753July 1, 1943, ch. 18757 Stat. 371

Section 302, , , exempted persons in military service in time of war from paying poll taxes or other taxes as a condition of voting in any election for President, Vice President, electors for President or Vice President, or for Senator or Member of the House of Representatives.act Sept. 16, 1942, ch. 561, title I, § 256 Stat. 753
Section 303, acts , title I, § 3, ; , , provided for voting in accordance with State law.Sept. 16, 1942, ch. 56156 Stat. 753Apr. 1, 1944, ch. 15058 Stat. 136
Additional RepealSections 301 to 303 were also repealed by , .act Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370 Stat. 641
